title: Amtech T0740 70mm Heavy Duty Security Padlock
features: DURABLE: This heavy duty 70mm security padlock has a solid steel body and an ABS protective case with a 10m diameter hardened steel shackle
WATERPROOF: With a double detent locking mechanism, it has a weather resistant lock shutter
VERSATILE: Supplied with 4 keys, it is ideal for a wide range of security applications
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x HEAVY DUTY 70mm SECURITY PADLOCK See more
